EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} changed a deployment key for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove a deployment key for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to change a deployment key for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created a deployment key for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create a deployment key for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed a deployment key for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
